name: Kyro Chat Dev

ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/postgresq.postCreateCommand: sudo -u postgres psql -c "ALTER USER postgres PASSWORD 'password';" && sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE DATABASE chatbot;" && sudo -u postgres psql -d chatbot -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;"

postCreateCommand: npm install -g pnpm@latest && pnpm install && pnpm approve-builds --all
